LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, NA'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER DEEMING THE TRUTH OF THE MATTERS SPECIFIED IN PLAINTIFFS REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS AS ADMITTED IS GRANTED. BECAUSE DEFENDANT ANTHONY DANIEL HAS NOT SERVED ANY RESPONSES TO WELLS FARGO'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION, THOSE REQUESTS ARE DEEMED ADMITTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. VISITING JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: W. calendar.matters:
MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion For An Order Deeming The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Plaintiffs Request For Admissions As Admitted
Off Calendar Apr-20-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Anthony Daniel, 415-412-1851 Pro Per Defendant.

No other appearances

Matter was not properly contested. No argument is held. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, NA'S Motion For An Order Deeming The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Plaintiffs Request For Admissions As Admitted.

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, NA's motion for an order deeming admitted its requests for admission is granted. Because defendant Anthony Daniel has not served any responses to Wells Fargo's requests for admission, those requests are deemed admitted. No opposition filed.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/HEK)
